---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for the KELTA platform.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Request

## Summary

Provide a concise description of the proposed feature.

---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve?

Describe the current limitation or pain point.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the preferred implementation from a business perspective.

---

## Business Value

What value does this feature provide?

Examples:

- Improves productivity
- Reduces manual work
- Enhances security
- Improves reporting
- Better user experience
- Regulatory compliance
- Performance improvement

---

## Target Module

Select the primary module.

Examples:

- Authentication
- Members
- Membership Applications
- District Management
- Committees
- Meetings
- Payments
- Certificates
- CMS
- Dashboard
- Notifications
- Reports
- Infrastructure
- Other

---

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Database
- [ ] API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Testing

---

## User Story

As a

> ___________________

I want

> ___________________

So that

> ___________________

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

---

## Priority

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

---

## Dependencies

Does this depend on another feature?

If yes, specify.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches that were evaluated.

---

## Screenshots / Mockups

Attach sketches, wireframes, or screenshots if available.

---

## Additional Notes

Include any other information relevant to this request.
